definition.name: cuntz_algebra
definition.definition: The Cuntz algebra O_n (n ≥ 2) is the universal C*-algebra generated by n isometries S_1, ..., S_n satisfying S_i* S_j = δ_{ij} 1 and Σ_{i=1}^n S_i S_i* = 1. Key properties: (1) Simple: no non-trivial closed two-sided ideals. (2) Purely infinite: every non-zero hereditary C*-subalgebra contains an infinite projection. (3) No tracial states. (4) No finite-dimensional representations.
